---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Description
<!-- Clear description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why would this feature be useful? Who would benefit? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Real-world example of how this would be used. -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should this feature work? Any specific implementation ideas? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered other ways to solve this? -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Are there any existing issues related to this? Reference them: #123 -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, reference materials, etc. -->

## Priority
- [ ] 🔴 High — Would significantly improve the site
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Nice-to-have improvement
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Can be addressed later
